config-quicksearch-enable-tooltip: Enables or disables the quick search feature.
config-quicksearch-result-list-height-to: Sets the height of the search result list in pixels.
config-zoom-enable-tooltip: Registers the zoom hotkey. Default: Z.
config-zoom-strength-tooltip: Sets how far the camera zooms in.
config-zoom-speed-tooltip: Sets how quickly the camera zooms in and out.
config-zoom-vignette-strength-tooltip: Sets the vignette strength while zooming. 0 disables the vignette.
config-tooltip-height-tooltip: Sets the height of the tooltip element in pixels.
config-tooltip-width-tooltip: Sets the width of the tooltip element in pixels.
config-tooltip-center-text-tooltip: Centers the text within the tooltip element.
config-tooltip-offset-x-tooltip: Sets the horizontal offset of the tooltip element in pixels.
config-tooltip-offset-y-tooltip: Sets the vertical offset of the tooltip element in pixels.
config-tooltip-dialog-area-horizontal-to: Sets the horizontal anchor of the tooltip element on the screen.
config-tooltip-dialog-area-vertical-tool: Sets the vertical anchor of the tooltip element on the screen.
config-tooltip-padding-top-tooltip: Sets the inner top padding of the tooltip element in pixels.
config-tooltip-padding-right-tooltip: Sets the inner right padding of the tooltip element in pixels.
config-tooltip-padding-bottom-tooltip: Sets the inner bottom padding of the tooltip element in pixels.
config-tooltip-padding-left-tooltip: Sets the inner left padding of the tooltip element in pixels.
config-tooltip-has-background-tooltip: Enables or disables a background behind the tooltip element.
config-tooltip-background-opacity-toolti: Sets the opacity of the tooltip background (0 = transparent, 1 = opaque).
config-tooltip-background-corner-radius-: Sets the corner radius of the tooltip background in pixels.
config-tooltip-font-size-tooltip: Sets the font size of the tooltip text in pixels.
